input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.1.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.1.2.1
            TITLE: dynamic area – any designated portion(s) of the competition site where the vehicles may

            CONTENT:
            rule D.1.2.1: Dynamic Area – Any designated portion(s) of the competition site where the vehicles may
D.1.2.1 Dynamic Area – Any designated portion(s) of the competition site where the vehicles may 
move under their own power.  This includes competition, inspection and practice areas.

final_answer: rule D.1.2.1: Dynamic Area – Any designated portion(s) of the competition site where the vehicles may move under their own power. This includes competition, inspection and practice areas.
